emails.subject: Re: First Gas Writedown
emails.body: Re: First Gas Writedown Brent, Excellent update. I would like to see the breakdown by pieces for a potential write-down especially volume difference only and look at a 1 year adjustment to begin. Thanks, Mike Brent A Price 12/27/2000 11:21 AM

emails.body: As discussed, we will get time on your schedule tomorrow afternoon (Friday) to discuss. From: Mike McConnell 12/28/2000 11:05 AM
